parsed.clarification_question: Is the intent of 'take a look at this paragraph' to request a general review of the research content (activating several R1 dimensions at 0.7), or simply to acknowledge the artifact without further action (keeping all R1 at 0.0)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is set as peripheral because it is always active for responsible handling of potential ambiguities in research descriptions, though not centrally requested.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is peripherally relevant as a cross-cutting measure to mitigate exaggerated statements in any examination of research artifacts.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is always active and peripheral here to ensure any projection remains within the defined responsibility space despite the vague delegation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is set to peripheral as it is always considered to prevent unintended negative impacts from technical discussions.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is peripherally important to maintain accountability in referencing research details, even in minimal delegations.
